description_long: This is a mid-century modern style cabinet or shelving unit, featuring a striking combination of teal blue and natural wood tones. The structure is asymmetrical, with angled lines and a mix of open shelving and closed storage compartments. The left side has a tall, vertical cabinet door with a black handle, while the right side features open triangular shelves supported by metal rods. Below the open shelves, there is a wide drawer with a matching black handle, and the entire unit stands on short, tapered legs. The surfaces have a wood grain texture, and the open design allows for both display and storage. The overall look is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban interiors such as living rooms, offices, or lobbies.
description: A stylish, asymmetrical cabinet with teal blue panels, natural wood shelves, and black handles, featuring both open and closed storage spaces. Its mid-century modern design includes angled lines, metal supports, and short legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the cabinet, the angled top, and the layered shelves supported by metal rods.
description_view_1: A clear side profile highlighting the open triangular shelves and the geometric structure of the unit.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the solid teal blue panel with minimal visible features.
description_view_3: Front view revealing the main storage features: a tall cabinet door, open shelves, and a wide drawer, all with visible handles.
